summary_en: 600,000 shares (4.99% of shares outstanding), ¥1,000M upper limit, acquisition period May 15, 2026 to Feb 28, 2027, authorization under Companies Act Art. 165(3), method not disclosed in excerpt.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Based on Articles of Incorporation Pursuant to Companies Act Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: Kyokuto Boeki Kaisha resolved at its Board meeting on May 14, 2026 to acquire treasury stock under Companies Act Article 156 (as applied via Article 165(3)). The authorization is for up to 600,000 shares, representing 4.99% of shares outstanding (calculated on the 12,034,939 shares outstanding as of March 31, 2026), with an aggregate acquisition value ceiling of ¥1,000,000,000. The acquisition period is May 15, 2026 through February 28, 2027. The company stated its rationale as supporting medium- to long-term growth through capital-conscious strategy; this buyback aims to expand shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency. The specific acquisition method (open-market, ToSTNeT-3, etc.) is not disclosed in this excerpt.
